name: TOP_ASSIGNEES_BY_TECHCLASS1_3Y
description: Top assignees by TechnologyClass1 category last 3 years. Auto-generated from the core-four benchmark and aligned to the validated query-frame Cypher semantics.
cypher:
MATCH (ymax:Year)
WITH max(ymax.year) AS max_year
MATCH (tc:TechnologyClass1 {name: $technologyclass1})<-[:HAS_TECHNOLOGY_CLASS1]-(tp:TargetPair)<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]->(a:Assignee)
MATCH (p)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(y:Year)
WHERE y.year >= max_year - $years + 1
RETURN a.name AS assignee, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count, count(DISTINCT tp) AS targetpair_count
ORDER BY patent_count DESC, targetpair_count DESC, assignee
LIMIT 10

examples: In the last three years, within the Trans-Bridging Immune Engagers TechnologyClass1 category, which companies published the most patents?
Over the most recent three-year window, which assignees lead by patent count in the Tumor-Intrinsic Control TechnologyClass1 category?
In the last three years, which companies lead in Other Immune-Checkpoint-Related Mechanisms target-pair combinations by patent count?
